review_text: Great experience!!
Tricia & her team are awesome! Great customer service, very personable & clearly pros at what they do. They've made me feel at ease every step of the way.

I had a great experience at Removery! Trisha made the consultation process super easy and comfortable, she explained everything clearly and answered all my questions without any pressure.  When it came to the procedure, Erica was amazing.  She was professional, gentle, and made sure I felt at ease the whole time.  You can tell they both really care about their clients.  Highly recommend if you’re considering tattoo removal!

Great place to get your tattoo removed!
Great communication and staff !
Erica is always so welcoming and does an amazing job !

I've been to two removery locations now (the last one being on the east coast) and they're always great. The folks at this location are particularly phenomenal though. Great chat, cosy environment, and the least painful lasering I've had done to date (which is a significant amount). I really recommend them.

Update March 2026: I've faced some health struggles and the folks here have been unbelievably gracious about rescheduling, long breaks, and adjusting our treatment plan. As someone who doesn't feel comfortable with people easily I can say that I always feel comfortable here. You're really in great hands at this location.
Trish has been nothing but the best.
Happy I found Removery.  They helped with my tattoo removal and they were very nice to me. Thank you
Excellent!
Every staff member makes this process as painless as possible. They’re all very kind, and knowledgeable about the treatment. I highly recommend Removery, this location in particular!
Incredible and fast service! They did a great job on the eyebrows I am thrilled with my results! I highly recommend Removery to all!
Great spot!! Lovely technicians and super professional

I had my first, quick removal session and a complimentary consultation with Tricia and Hillary, both of whom provided a welcoming environment. All rooms had respectful space for my guest. Will update after my end session.
My first time there for a consultation, and the service provided was very helpful and informative. I will be using their services.
Great atmosphere

I was nervous for it being my first time being here, but when I walked in. The receptionists were really nice and welcoming. The consultation was super informative and they made sure I understood and felt comfortable and they didn't pressure me to make a decision right there and then. I’m super excited to see my results further along the treatment.

This place is the real deal.  My appointment was for removal of my microbladed eyebrows.  After one session, there is already a huge difference.  Beautiful office and great people. Trisha and Hillary talk you through the process and explain everything thoroughly.  I highly recommend.
Amazing staff and great service! Very happy with my experience.

I went in for a consult, and it was an amazing experience. Tricia was professional, knowledgeable, and answered all the questions I had. In the end, I was happy with the quoted price. I look forward to starting my  removal process.
Jessica and Tricia are amazing!! Great experience removing my brow and neck tattoo.
Awesome job 👍👍👍👍👍

Tricia & Hillary were amazing. This is something I have always wanted to get done, so I finally pulled the trigger. Tricia is very informative and kind, Hillary is so sweet and made the process very easy & fast! I can’t wait till my next session !
Tricia provided great information and insight on the process. I also appreciate the transparency of your pricing!
10/10 highly recommended worth every penny. The best technicians too, super friendly & listen to all your concerns making sure they thoroughly go over your whole tattoo. Shout out Erica and Emilia!!

I’ve had 3 appointments at Removery so far. Everyone is extremely nice and understanding and is willing to answer any questions I have. I would recommend this place to anyone looking for tattoo removal.

I’ve been going to Removery for years. Emilia is honestly the best tech I’ve had. She always had made sure my healing went well and asks if I’m seeing a difference. She is so sweet and the first tech I’ve seen real results with. Grateful my tattoos are making progress.

Emilia (I hope I’m spelling her name right) was amazing, I loved her honesty and anyone who can have a conversation and make me laugh is where I’m spending my money! Thank you, if it wasn’t for her, I might not even have been starting the removal journey! Excited for what’s to come!
The staff have always been so friendly and informative. Even with  stubborn removal.
So friendly! Wonderful experience!
Everyone there is incredibly friendly. The process is super easy and less painful then you'd expect.
I’ve had the best experience and results with this location! thank you guys so much!
Amazing 🤩 looking forward to next appointment

I recently completed my tattoo removal with Removery. I did all of my sessions at the Lincoln Square location in Chicago with Emilia. She was great to work with.  She was very knowledgeable and professional.  The location was clean and easy to schedule my sessions. It took about 12 sessions and is completely gone. I would definitely recommend Removery.

Prices starts At about $2000
All I wanted was to cut straight to the point and tell me what the Price ,gave me a whole speech and had me waiting for a long time just to eventually tell me for a small tattoo $2200
